alkylation reagent: alkylated in the dark with iodoacetamide (20 mM, 30 min, 25°C)
alkylation concentration: alkylated in the dark with iodoacetamide (20 mM, 30 min, 25°C)
cleavage agent: digested at 37°C overnight with trypsin (ration protein:enzyme 10:1)
collision energy: selected for fragmentation at normalized collision energy of 35%
fragmentation method: Fragment ion spectra produced via collision-induced dissociation (CID)
instrument: Samples were analyzed using an LTQ-Orbitrap XL mass spectrometer
ionization type: The mass spectrometer was operated in positive ionization mode
labeling: Samples were analyzed using an LTQ-Orbitrap XL mass spectrometer
